name: Beef with Bow-Tie Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 12-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Trim excess fat from the beef and cut into 2-inch strips.
3. Cut the strips crosswise into 1/8-inch slices.
4. Heat the skillet over medium heat until hot.
5. Cook asparagus, onions, and 1 cup of broth for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the liquid has evaporated; remove from the skillet.
6. Add beef to the skillet and cook, stirring frequently, about 2 minutes or until no longer pink.
7. Return vegetables to the skillet.
8. Add remaining broth and ingredients except cheese; cook, stirring frequently, about 2 minutes or until mixture is hot.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
